plain_language.en: Total knee joint replacement surgery (Knee Arthroplasty)
plain_language.es: Cirugía de reemplazo total de articulación de rodilla
plain_language.fr: Chirurgie de remplacement complet de la rotule (Prothèse de genou)
plain_language.ar: عملية استبدال مفصل الركبة بالكامل بمفصل صناعي
plain_language.hi: घुटने का जोड़ पूरी तरह बदलने की सर्जरी (नी रिप्लेसमेंट)
plain_language.pt: Cirurgia de substituição total da articulação do joelho

notes: Arthroplasty, knee, condyle and patella; medial and lateral compartments (total replacement).
